item.title: Trump is the first president to have an airport named after …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Trump is the first president to have an airport named after him while in office. The Trump Organization says he won't get royalties from the renaming, but legal experts see potential loopholes.
item.content:encoded: Trump is the first president to have an airport named after him while in office. The Trump Organization says he won't get royalties from the renaming, but legal experts see potential loopholes.

item.title: The Trump administration's executive orders have meant that …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Trump administration's executive orders have meant that administrators are questioning what art can — and can't — be seen on campus. n.pr/4faIm8p
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration's executive orders have meant that administrators are questioning what art can — and can't — be seen on campus. n.pr/4faIm8p

item.title: ⚾️ ONE N' ONLY沢村玲の夢叶う！⚾️ ZOZOマリンでセレモニアルピッチ 「ライブより緊張しました」 …
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
⚾️ ONE N' ONLY沢村玲の夢叶う！⚾️
ZOZOマリンでセレモニアルピッチ
「ライブより緊張しました」

🚅 夢の実現、聞いたのは新幹線
「ドッキリだったら許さないと思って（笑）」
🏟️マウンドに立った感想は？
「最高のスタジアムだな」

⏬詳細・📸写真37枚
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680480?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

@onenonly_tokyo
item.content:encoded:
⚾️ ONE N' ONLY沢村玲の夢叶う！⚾️
ZOZOマリンでセレモニアルピッチ
「ライブより緊張しました」

🚅 夢の実現、聞いたのは新幹線
「ドッキリだったら許さないと思って（笑）」
🏟️マウンドに立った感想は？
「最高のスタジアムだな」

item.title: After getting hit with tariffs for the imported board games …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: After getting hit with tariffs for the imported board games he sells, Jonathan Silva decided to see if he could produce a version of his Monopoly game in the United States. This is what he learned. n.pr/4gzq5E8
item.content:encoded: After getting hit with tariffs for the imported board games he sells, Jonathan Silva decided to see if he could produce a version of his Monopoly game in the United States. This is what he learned. n.pr/4gzq5E8

item.title: U.S. Sen. Lindsey Graham died Saturday evening after a "brie…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: U.S. Sen. Lindsey Graham died Saturday evening after a "brief and sudden illness. n.pr/4wCsmD4
item.content:encoded: U.S. Sen. Lindsey Graham died Saturday evening after a "brief and sudden illness. n.pr/4wCsmD4

item.title: The Apple TV series wraps noir inside science fiction. With …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Apple TV series wraps noir inside science fiction. With subtlety and charm, Farrell plays an earnest alien just doing his best as a private eye in Los Angeles.
item.content:encoded: The Apple TV series wraps noir inside science fiction. With subtlety and charm, Farrell plays an earnest alien just doing his best as a private eye in Los Angeles.

item.title: Argentina was taken to the brink in its first two knockout g…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Argentina was taken to the brink in its first two knockout games. In Saturday's quarterfinal against Switzerland, the Albiceleste survived again to advance to the semis, where they will face England. n.pr/4voCFcS
item.content:encoded: Argentina was taken to the brink in its first two knockout games. In Saturday's quarterfinal against Switzerland, the Albiceleste survived again to advance to the semis, where they will face England. n.pr/4voCFcS

item.title: 日向坂46藤嶌果歩 猫耳つけてキュートに笑う🐈️🐾 「お家にいたらこんな感じかな？」 https://nata…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
日向坂46藤嶌果歩
猫耳つけてキュートに笑う🐈️🐾
「お家にいたらこんな感じかな？」
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680433?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

#藤嶌果歩1st写真集
item.content:encoded:
日向坂46藤嶌果歩
猫耳つけてキュートに笑う🐈️🐾
「お家にいたらこんな感じかな？」
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680433?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

#藤嶌果歩1st写真集

item.title: A historic rainfall event has left communities across severa…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A historic rainfall event has left communities across several Missouri counties underwater and prompted water rescues, including an evacuation of a summer camp. n.pr/44ZRjMY
item.content:encoded: A historic rainfall event has left communities across several Missouri counties underwater and prompted water rescues, including an evacuation of a summer camp. n.pr/44ZRjMY

item.title: Lorde spoke out against “fucked up” AI glasses during her se…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Lorde spoke out against “fucked up” AI glasses during her set at Mad Cool. Ray-Ban is a sponsor of the Madrid festival, and Ray-Ban Meta AI ambassador Jennie took the stage directly after her.

[📷: Javier Bragado]
item.content:encoded:
Lorde spoke out against “fucked up” AI glasses during her set at Mad Cool. Ray-Ban is a sponsor of the Madrid festival, and Ray-Ban Meta AI ambassador Jennie took the stage directly after her.

[📷: Javier Bragado]

item.title: In the summer of 2020, sixteen-year-old Antonio Mays Jr. tra…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In the summer of 2020, sixteen-year-old Antonio Mays Jr. traveled a thousand miles to join the racial justice movement of his generation. He arrived in Seattle during the Capitol Hill Occupied Protest, known as CHOP. Less than a week later, he was shot and killed there. The case remains unsolved.
item.content:encoded: In the summer of 2020, sixteen-year-old Antonio Mays Jr. traveled a thousand miles to join the racial justice movement of his generation. He arrived in Seattle during the Capitol Hill Occupied Protest, known as CHOP. Less than a week later, he was shot and killed there. The case remains unsolved.

item.title: Just in: England's Jude Bellingham has done it again. Scori…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
Just in:

England's Jude Bellingham has done it again. Scoring both of his team's goals in a thrilling quarterfinal against Norway that needed extra time. It was the first World Cup meeting between the two.
item.content:encoded:
Just in:

England's Jude Bellingham has done it again. Scoring both of his team's goals in a thrilling quarterfinal against Norway that needed extra time. It was the first World Cup meeting between the two.

item.title: Should patients who choose euthanasia be able to die by havi…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Should patients who choose euthanasia be able to die by having their vital organs removed for donation? The ethical concerns are substantial.
item.content:encoded: Should patients who choose euthanasia be able to die by having their vital organs removed for donation? The ethical concerns are substantial.

item.title: The passports feature an image of President Trump and are on…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The passports feature an image of President Trump and are only available in person at the Washington Passport Agency — and only by appointment.
item.content:encoded: The passports feature an image of President Trump and are only available in person at the Washington Passport Agency — and only by appointment.

item.title: Many schools rely on consumer fees funneled through the fede…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Many schools rely on consumer fees funneled through the federal government to cut internet costs. FCC Chairman Brendan Carr called for ending this program before Donald Trump tapped him for the job.
item.content:encoded: Many schools rely on consumer fees funneled through the federal government to cut internet costs. FCC Chairman Brendan Carr called for ending this program before Donald Trump tapped him for the job.

item.title: If an undergraduate program's graduates don't earn more than…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: If an undergraduate program's graduates don't earn more than workers who never went to college, that program could be cut off from federal student loans. But is a degree just about making more money?
item.content:encoded: If an undergraduate program's graduates don't earn more than workers who never went to college, that program could be cut off from federal student loans. But is a degree just about making more money?

item.title: The story of Motown Records is quintessentially American. It…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
The story of Motown Records is quintessentially American. It’s about the American Dream, civil rights and entrepreneurship.
But that story has a special significance in the place where it all got started.
item.content:encoded:
The story of Motown Records is quintessentially American. It’s about the American Dream, civil rights and entrepreneurship.
But that story has a special significance in the place where it all got started.

item.title: Billie Holiday's accompanist. John Coltrane's collaborator. …
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Billie Holiday's accompanist. John Coltrane's collaborator. ECM's very first artist. Mal Waldron's legacy reaches far beyond the spotlight.
item.content:encoded: Billie Holiday's accompanist. John Coltrane's collaborator. ECM's very first artist. Mal Waldron's legacy reaches far beyond the spotlight.

item.title: After offering Twin Temple a gig (because Charley Crockett d…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:

item.title: July's crop of notable releases features new work from Colso…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: July's crop of notable releases features new work from Colson Whitehead, Sigrid Nuñez, Daniel Mason and Nathaniel Rich. Plus, new nonfiction from award-winning journalists.
item.content:encoded: July's crop of notable releases features new work from Colson Whitehead, Sigrid Nuñez, Daniel Mason and Nathaniel Rich. Plus, new nonfiction from award-winning journalists.

item.title: The Summer Hotlist spotlights the upcoming albums generating…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: The Summer Hotlist spotlights the upcoming albums generating the most excitement on Bandcamp, based on fan pre-orders. Which releases are at the top of your list?
item.content:encoded: The Summer Hotlist spotlights the upcoming albums generating the most excitement on Bandcamp, based on fan pre-orders. Which releases are at the top of your list?
